description: Workflow automation, integration platforms, and no-code/low-code app builders.

entries.name: Zapier
entries.summary: The original no-code automation platform connecting thousands of apps with trigger-action workflows.

entries.name: Make (formerly Integromat)
entries.summary: Visual workflow automation builder with more granular branching/looping logic than typical no-code tools.

entries.name: n8n
entries.summary: Open-source, self-hostable workflow automation tool with a fair-code license and code-step support.
entries.freeTier: Self-hosted is free and unlimited; n8n Cloud has a free trial.

entries.name: Pipedream
entries.summary: Developer-focused integration platform combining low-code workflows with full code-step flexibility.

entries.name: Bubble
entries.summary: No-code platform for building full web applications visually, including database and workflow logic.
entries.freeTier: Free plan for personal/learning projects (Bubble branding, limited capacity).

entries.name: Retool
entries.summary: Low-code platform for building internal tools and admin dashboards quickly by connecting to existing data sources.

entries.name: Airtable
entries.summary: Spreadsheet-database hybrid with automation, forms, and views, used for lightweight app-like workflows.

entries.name: Activepieces
entries.summary: Open-source Zapier alternative for business automation, extensible with custom TypeScript pieces.
entries.freeTier: Self-hosted fully free; cloud has a free tier with limited tasks.

entries.name: Coupler.io
entries.summary: Data integration tool that syncs data between apps, spreadsheets, and BI dashboards on a schedule.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with limited scheduled syncs.
